channel.title: Rhode Map | Boston Globe
channel.description: Dan McGowan - Columnist - The Boston Globe

item.title: Dan McGowan - Columnist - The Boston Globe
item.description: Dan McGowan is a Rhode Island-based columnist for the Boston Globe. He authors Globe Rhode Island's widely read daily newsletter, Rhode Map, and moderates in-person panels, discussions, and ...

item.title: Articles by Dan McGowan's Profile - Muck Rack
item.description: Globe Columnist Dan McGowan was up super early to chat with Patrick Little on "12 News This Morning" about today's edition of Rhode Map. You can watch the segment here: The 2026 election is still a long way away, but a state representative is openly flirting with the idea of challenging Providence Mayor Brett Smiley in the Democratic primary.

item.title: How did New England's students do on the NAEP test? Nation's Report ...
item.description: Get Rhode Map. A weekday briefing from veteran Rhode Island reporters, focused on the things that matter most in the Ocean State. ... Dan McGowan can be reached at dan.mcgowan@globe.com.

item.title: Patrick Kennedy calls cousin RFK Jr. the 'leader we need' on addiction ...
